SDALGCP2 — To-do

Source: TODO.md

The package is CRAN-ready: R CMD check --as-cran gives 0 errors, 0 warnings, and 2 NOTEs that are both expected (“New submission”; a non-portable compiler flag injected by the local R Makeconf, not by the package). Spelling is clean, all URLs resolve, every exported topic has \value, and cran-comments.md documents the submission.

Optional / nice-to-have (not blocking submission)

Done

On this page
